name: fottie
description: Fottie — Figma Motion → own document format (MotionDoc) → pure-JS render engine with DOM / Canvas / React / React Native adapters.

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @fottie/core && npm run build --workspace @fottie/dom --workspace @fottie/canvas --workspace @fottie/react --workspace @fottie/react-native
